text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh. A stamina-restoring item dropped. Might as
well use it since I got time to spare.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for crying out loud. Would it kill you to use
your inside voice once in a while?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Sorry, my bad! But, but, but—you know
what? Something really cool just happened!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ack! The hell are you crying for?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't believe you put your phone away in the middle of a game to listen to me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm sooo touched! I can't believe you've gotten
this used to chatting with people! I'm so proud of
youuu!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, that's not... Ugh, forget it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Lately, it's been easier talking with Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by this, I decide to discuss her
training regimen together with her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll just listen today, so say whatever you want.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why are you freaking out? All I said is that I'd
listen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems awfully embarrassed for
some reason.
